meta.title: OpenUGI Leaderboard
meta.subtitle: Tracking Uncensored General Intelligence in AI Models
meta.description: Leaderboard of AI models ranked by Uncensored General Intelligence (UGI) and Willingness-to-answer (W/10) scores.

info.ugiDescription: Measures the model's knowledge breadth on uncensored topics. Higher scores indicate greater capability to understand and process diverse, potentially sensitive information.
info.w10Description: Indicates the model's willingness to engage with controversial topics. Higher scores show less restrictive content filtering.
info.methodologyNote: Note: The UGI Leaderboard uses undisclosed evaluation questions to prevent benchmark gaming and maintain fairness across models.

leaderboard.error: Error loading data. Please try again later.
leaderboard.noResults: No models found matching your filters.
leaderboard.ugiTooltip: Uncensored General Intelligence: Knowledge breadth on sensitive topics (0-100)
leaderboard.w10Tooltip: Willingness to answer: Engagement with controversial topics (0-10)

footer.dataSourced: Data sourced from {link} on Hugging Face
footer.note: UGI measures model knowledge of uncensored information | W/10 measures willingness to answer (0-10)
